---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
# 设置工作路径
library(rstudioapi);setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$'path'));getwd()


### 模拟数据生成 ----
set.seed(12)
methods <- c("CIBERSORT", "EPIC", "MCPcounter", "xCell", "TIMER")
types <- paste0("ImmuneType_", 1:25)
cor_values <- runif(25, -0.45, 0.45)
pvals <- runif(25, 0.0001, 0.051)
signif_labels <- ifelse(pvals < 0.001, "***",
                        ifelse(pvals < 0.01, "**",
                               ifelse(pvals < 0.05, "*", "")))
plotdata <- data.frame(
  Method = sample(methods, 25, replace = TRUE),
  TME.Type = types,
  cor.R = round(cor_values, 3),
  p.value = round(pvals, 4),
  Signif = signif_labels
)

### 数据准备 ----
# 使用上一步生成的模拟数据
plotdata$Sign <- ifelse(plotdata$cor.R > 0, "Pos", "Neg")

# 排序处理：正负相关分别排序
# 提取正相关的 TME 类型并按方法和相关性排序
order_pos <- plotdata %>%
  filter(cor.R > 0) %>%                  # 保留正相关条目，用于区分效应方向
  arrange(Method, cor.R) %>%            # 按方法分组后按相关性升序排列，便于图形展示
  pull(TME.Type)                        # 提取排序后的 TME 类型，作为因子水平或绘图顺序

order_neg <- plotdata %>%
  filter(cor.R <= 0) %>%
  arrange(Method, desc(cor.R)) %>%
  pull(TME.Type) %>%
  rev()

plotdata$TME.Type <- factor(plotdata$TME.Type, levels = c(order_neg, order_pos))

### 绘图 ----
colors <- c('#901441','#4daa91','#535296', '#9cd4eb', "#233865")
ggplot(data = plotdata) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = cor.R, y = TME.Type, yend = TME.Type, color = Method),
               linewidth = 1, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_point(aes(x = cor.R, y = TME.Type, color = Method), size = 8) +
  geom_point(aes(x = cor.R, y = TME.Type, color = Method), size = 10, shape = 21, fill = NA) +
  
  # 添加标签：左侧为正相关，右侧为负相关
  geom_text(data = filter(plotdata, Sign == "Pos"),
            aes(x = -0.03, y = TME.Type, label = TME.Type, colour = Method),
            hjust = "right", size = 5, family = "serif", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = filter(plotdata, Sign == "Neg"),
            aes(x = 0.03, y = TME.Type, label = TME.Type, colour = Method),
            hjust = "left", size = 5, family = "serif", show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  # 添加显著性标记
  geom_text(data = filter(plotdata, Sign == "Pos"),
            aes(x = cor.R + 0.03, y = TME.Type, label = Signif, color = Sign),
            size = 8, vjust = 0.7, hjust = 0, family = "serif", show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(data = filter(plotdata, Sign == "Neg"),
            aes(x = cor.R - 0.03, y = TME.Type, label = Signif, color = Sign),
            size = 8, vjust = 0.7, hjust = 1, family = "serif", show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  # 中轴线与坐标设定
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.1, 0.1)),
                     limits = c(-0.5, 0.5),
                     breaks = c(-0.4, -0.2, 0, 0.2, 0.4)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0.06, 0.06))) +
  labs(x = "Spearman.R", y = "") +
  
  # 颜色设定
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Pos" = "#cb181d", "Neg" = "#08519c",
                                setNames(colors, unique(plotdata$Method))),
                     breaks = unique(plotdata$Method)) +
  
  # 主题美化
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "#000000", size = 18, family = "serif"),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "#000000", size = 20, family = "serif"),
    panel.border = element_rect(color = "#000000", linewidth = 1.5),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "#f0f0f0", linewidth = 0.7),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "#f0f0f0", linewidth = 0.7),
    legend.text = element_text(color = "#000000", size = 12, family = "serif"),
    legend.title = element_text(color = "#000000", size = 15, family = "serif")
  )

### 保存图形 ----
png("棒棒糖图.png",width = 8,height = 8,unit = "in",res = 600,family = "serif")
dev.off()

```

# Save plot
ggsave("棒棒糖图.png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
